description_long: This is a single-story wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in light-colored shingles. The structure features a spacious, partially covered porch with a slatted pergola on one side, accessible by a set of wide steps. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior walls are clad in natural wood, giving the cabin a warm, rustic appearance. The roof overhangs provide shade and protection to the porch and entry areas. The cabin is elevated slightly above ground level, supported by visible posts.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, large windows, and a spacious porch with a pergola and wide steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch with a slatted pergola, wide steps, and large windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, a large window, and the depth of the porch structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, the extended roof, and the open deck area.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with a smaller entry door, clerestory windows, and the full width of the steps.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in light-colored asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with large rectangular windows on the front and side, a set of sliding glass doors at the rear, and clerestory windows above the entry door
attribute_door_placement: One main door on the narrow end with clerestory windows above, and a set of sliding glass doors on the opposite long side opening to the deck
